case_title: MENCHIE TAVITA VS. LIEM NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-28-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
